code_issues.issue: Integration tests not using build tags, run during 'go test -short' and fail when services aren't running
code_issues.fix: Add '// +build integration' build tag or use -tags=integration flag properly. Integration tests should be skipped during unit test runs

code_issues.issue: Nil pointer dereference panic in cleanup when database connection fails - error from pgx.Connect is ignored with _
code_issues.fix: Check error from pgx.Connect before using conn: 'conn, err := pgx.Connect(ctx, databaseURL); if err != nil { return }'

code_issues.issue: Custom contains() implementation has logic issues - inefficient and doesn't properly check for substring
code_issues.fix: Use strings.Contains() instead of custom implementation

code_issues.issue: Test coverage is 58%, below recommended 80% for test utilities
code_issues.fix: Add more tests for edge cases and error paths in testutil package

code_issues.issue: No test documentation (TESTING.md, tests/README.md) explaining how to run tests
code_issues.fix: Create TEST.md or docs/testing.md documenting test setup, running unit vs integration tests, and test environment requirements

missing_items: No TEST.md or testing documentation file explaining test infrastructure
No integration test build tag enforcement
No test coverage reporting in CI/CD configuration
Missing testdata directory with sample fixtures
No test environment validation in Makefile (make test-env doesn't verify migrations exist)
blocking_issues: Integration tests panic with nil pointer dereference in cleanup code
Integration tests run during 'go test -short' and fail because services aren't running
fix_instructions:
1. Add '//go:build integration' build tag to tests/integration/api_test.go
2. Fix nil pointer panic in api_test.go:355 - check pgx.Connect error before using conn
3. Create docs/testing.md documenting the test infrastructure
4. Add more tests to testutil package to increase coverage above 70%
5. Ensure make test-integration properly uses -tags=integration flag
6. Add migration validation to make test-env target
